blockers.description: Background agent for plan 03-07 was still running when pause was requested
blockers.workaround: On resume: check git log for '03-07' commits. If Tasks 1 & 2 are committed, proceed to human-verify checkpoint (Task 3). If not committed, re-run /gsd-execute-phase 03.

human_actions_pending.action: Run full 5-meja smoke test (7 steps) in docker compose
human_actions_pending.context: Task 3 of plan 03-07 is a blocking human-verify checkpoint for the complete Phase 03 end-to-end flow. Steps: dashboard+lock-screen, Meja1 hadir, Meja2 penimbangan, Meja3 tanda klinis, Meja4 AI warning, Meja5 selesai, rekap harian download.

decisions.decision: Use native HTML <input type='checkbox'> + Tailwind instead of shadcn Checkbox
decisions.rationale: @radix-ui/react-checkbox not in package.json; consistent with prior plans (03-02, 03-05)

decisions.decision: Use native <textarea> instead of shadcn Textarea
decisions.rationale: No shadcn Textarea in components/ui/; consistent pattern across all meja pages

decisions.decision: Graceful degradation for Google STT and OpenAI when env vars not set
decisions.rationale: Dev/academic environment may not have API keys; stub responses allow UI testing without credentials

decisions.decision: worktrees=false; sequential execution on main working tree

uncommitted_files: backend/package-lock.json (modified — from package installs in prior plans)
next_action: Check git log for 03-07 commits. If Tasks 1 & 2 are done, proceed to human-verify (Task 3 checkpoint). If not, re-run: /gsd-execute-phase 03
context_notes: Phase 03 is the Kader 5-Meja flow — the core value of SISPOS. Plans 03-01 through 03-06 are fully complete this session. Only 03-07 remains: Meja5 selesai endpoint with moving average (QUEUE-05 critical), rekap harian export (ExcelJS + pdfkit), and the human smoke test. A background agent was building Tasks 1 & 2 when pause was requested.
